contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: capoeira: /community.html widened framing + Samba da Roda video
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/25
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/26
  
  Details:
  capoeira /community.html — widened framing + Samba da Roda video
  
  Two follow-on PRs after the main capoeira cluster, plus one more
  YouTube upload.
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#25 — Reframe /community.html from 'Life at
     Tribo Bahia Mirim' to 'Capoeira Community Life in Itacaré'.
     Operator-supplied context made it clear the batizado video we
     filmed was a regional gathering (multiple groups + masters,
     Bico Duro himself not present) rather than a Tribo Mirim-only
     event. New framing: 'Capoeira is a tradition the whole town
     keeps. Tribo Mirim is one of those groups.' Per-video captions
     tightened — batizado as regional gathering, caruru kept Tribo-
     local (since caruru that day was at the Tribo location).
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#26 — Add Samba da Roda (Praia da Coroa)
     as a third video card on /community.html. After the weekly
     Saturday-evening roda at Praça Santos Dumont, the capoeiristas
     of Itacaré walk to Praia da Coroa for a round of samba da
     roda — fits the wider-community framing.
  
  YouTube ops (no PR):
  
  3. Uploaded roda da samba.MP4 (~49MB) to admin@truesight.me YouTube
     as public + embeddable. Whisper transcript came back empty
     (mostly singing + percussion, no narration) so Grok composed
     the description from operator context. Title: 'Samba da Roda at
     Praia da Coroa, Itacaré | Agroverse' (per the SOP convention).
     Video ID lFoZjB5Aq-8.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
